## Summary
<!-- What does this change do? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] Playbook refactor
- [ ] Variable / inventory change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing
- [ ] Tested in lab against RHEL 9
- [ ] Tested in lab against RHEL 10
- [ ] Dry run (`--check`) passed
- [ ] Vault changes encrypted before commit

## Checklist
- [ ] No plaintext secrets in any committed file
- [ ] `requirements.yml` updated if new collections added
- [ ] `README.md` updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] Variable defaults updated in `inventory/group_vars/all.yml`
